message:
Command `# Only VDDIO and VSSIO have multiple ports (24 each - from padframe).
# Fix: Use ODB to remove all but the first PORT from VDDIO and VSSIO bterms.
# These are padframe power rails - DRT doesn't need to route them.

# Find the ODB Python API in librelane
ls /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/odbpy/ | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

# Only VDDIO and VSSIO have multiple ports (24 each - from padframe).
# Fix: Use ODB to remove all but the first PORT from VDDIO and VSSIO bterms.
# These are padframe power rails - DRT doesn't need to route them.

# Find the ODB Python API in librelane
